name: Welcome to your own Estate and Staff
description: A place where you are the master of your own destiny, and the world around you. You are the wealthy Master or Mistress of the estate. Anything goes, as is your will. Everything down to the way the staff looks to what you can do with them, and how the Estate operates is up to you. You can decide what kind of a property it is as well, be it an austere and reclusive manor hidden away in the forest or mountains, a seaside or lakeside compound on the edges of a town or city, or perhaps a winter Chateau or desert Oasis, or even your own private island. And you decide how you treat your staff as well; are you a strict but fair task master who keeps their servants in line, or a warm and gentle master of the house that the staff treat like a benevolent god or goddess?
creator: Double_D
